metadata.source: Current info-session deck, page 9, with production verification required.
metadata.reviewStatus: Verify against official admissions page before production.

headline: Admissions requirements
summary: The degree program is designed for students who already hold a bachelor's degree and meet the program's academic preparation requirements.

requirements.title: Existing bachelor’s degree
requirements.body: Applicants must already have a bachelor’s degree. Production wording should match the official admissions page exactly.

requirements.title: Minimum GPA
requirements.body: The current deck states a minimum 2.75 GPA. Verify this against official admissions materials before publication.

requirements.title: Math preparation
requirements.body: The current deck references CU ALEKS college algebra or calculus/AP calculus with a C-. Confirm current options, costs, and wording before launch.

requirements.title: Application materials
requirements.body: The current deck lists transcripts and a program questionnaire, with a personal essay optional and highly recommended for extenuating circumstances or low GPA.

checklist: Consider the optional personal essay if context would help the application.
Check the current application deadline before submitting.
deadlineNote: Exact deadlines should be stored in controlled content and reviewed before each admissions cycle.
feeNote: The current deck states that applications for the 2026 admission cycle are free. Verify current application fee language before publication.
